creator: tenser@hurricane.phys.psu.edu
text:
The old SWI-Prolog port was rather dated (being relative
	to version 2.8.3).  This is an update of that port to
	the current release, 3.2.5.  I tried to email Michael
	Butschky <butsch@computi.erols.com> to okay this with
	him, but that address bounced...  Anyway, I updated the
	``maintainer'' info in the Makefile to point to me,
	but I'm really not sure that that's appropriate; if Michael
	could be located, he should probably remain the maintainer.

How-To-Repeat: 
	This configures and builds correctly.  It also fixes some
	bugs with the old port, which preventing it from registering
	correctly without minor tweaks.
